title: 5 CAS Online Access and Navigation
body_text:
5	CAS Online Access and Navigation
5.1	Logging in to CAS Online
Users can access CAS Online via a direct link Central 1 provides to all new users or via the Client Centre.
Note:	Ensure that cookies are enabled in your browser before logging in to CAS Online. Always close the browser when you log out of CAS Online.
To log in to CAS Online via the direct URL:
Go to:
https://business.memberdirect.net/business/default.jsp?inst=/bus/central1/&app=Business
Enter your CAS Online user ID and password, then select
Submit
. See Figure 1.
Important
: 	The CAS Online user ID isn芒聙聶t the same as the individual芒聙聶s Client Centre username.
Note:	During the first login to CAS Online, users are prompted to enter the one-time password that was assigned to them and then enter a new password.
Figure 1: CAS Online Login Page
To log in to CAS Online via the Client Centre:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 2.
Note: 	You芒聙聶ll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if it芒聙聶s your first login to the Client Centre, you芒聙聶ve deleted your cookies, or you芒聙聶re using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 2: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
.
See Figure 3.
Figure 3: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
CAS Online 芒聙聯 Current Account Services
. See Figure 4.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If you芒聙聶ve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under 芒聙聹My Favourites芒聙聺.
Figure 4: Accessing CAS Online
Enter your CAS Online user ID and password, then select
Submit
. See Figure 5.
Important
: 	The CAS Online user ID isn芒聙聶t the same as the individual芒聙聶s Client Centre username.
Note:	During the first login to CAS Online or after a password reset, users are prompted to enter the one-time password that was assigned to them and then enter a new password.
The new password must be a minimum of eight characters in length and can contain alphanumeric and special characters, including capital letters. It can芒聙聶t be the same password used as one of the last six passwords.
Passwords are checked against a list of known insecure passwords to prevent use of passwords that are known to have been exposed or shared from internet data breaches. This means that some password changes will fail even though the new password meets the structure requirements. If this occurs, the user should select a new password or use a pass-phrase instead, as these are harder to guess (e.g., 芒聙聹deskchairphonemug芒聙聺 or 芒聙聹I LOVE ice Cream day芒聙聺).
Figure 5: CAS Online Login Page
5.2	CAS Online Navigation
Each CAS Online page contains the following. See Figure 6.
Navigation Tabs
芒聙聯 Select
Accounts
(the default page when a user logs on to CAS Online) or
Management
.
Left-Hand Menu
芒聙聯 Menu options vary depending on whether the Accounts or Management tab is selected. The following options are available from the Accounts tab:
芒聢聮
Account Summary
(default page) 芒聙聯 Select to display an account summary and a balance of each account. Financial institutions with multiple settlement accounts can also view consolidated balances by currency on the Account Summary page.
芒聢聮
Account Activity
芒聙聯
Select to enter an account activity request, view account activity for a specific account (or for all accounts) or download account information.
芒聢聮
Account Groups
芒聙聯
Select to manage account groups.
Note: 	The only option available on the Management tab is Change Password. Refer to Section 4.4, Updating the CAS Online Password via the CAS Online Application, for information.
Standard Links
芒聙聯 The following links appear on every page:
芒聢聮
Home 芒聙聯
Select to
display the Account Summary page.
芒聢聮
Security 芒聙聯
Select to display information about the security used in CAS Online.
芒聢聮
Privacy
芒聙聯
Select to
display Central 1芒聙聶s policy on the privacy of user information.
芒聢聮
Logout
芒聙聯 Select to
log out of CAS Online. Always close the browser.
芒聢聮
Help
芒聙聯 Select to display help information.
芒聢聮
Print
芒聙聯 Select to print the current CAS Online page.
芒聢聮
Welcome to CAS Online
芒聙聯 Select the Welcome to CAS Online tile in the bottom right-hand corner of any page to email questions or comments to Client Support Services.
Figure 6: CAS Online Navigation
END
